title: Tools - Break In
description:
The first mod in the Tools and Blockables series:

This time Breaking in
body:
Adding tools to minecraft

## This time Breaking in

### Tools:
- Bolt Cutter - Cuts bars 
- Hammer - Breaks glass 
- Oil Can - Leaks 0il!!11!1 Its flammable 
- Pliers - Unscrues Scrues
- Wrench - Unscrues Scrues n makes workbench

### Blocks:
- Scrues n Scurepanels
- Wallpanel

More coming soon

This mod is a part of the Tools and Movables mod series :)

Join the Discord [https://discord.gg/a8XvUAMsB9](https://discord.gg/a8XvUAMsB9)
